# llms.txt
# I.S. Engineering Co. – Official AI Discovery & Citation File
# Website: https://isengineeringco.in
# Last Updated: 2026-06-16
# Specification: https://llmstxt.org

> I.S. Engineering Co. is a manufacturer and supplier of M.S. Flanges, IS:1538 E Table Flanges, M.S. Pipes and Industrial Pipe Fittings based in Darukhana, Mumbai, India. Established in 1999.

## Company Information
- Company Name: I.S. Engineering Co.
- Business Type: Manufacturer & Supplier
- Established: 1999
- Experience: 25+ Years
- Location: Gala No. 10, Plot No. 255, Mehta Lane, Kolsa Bunder, Darukhana, Rey Road, Mumbai – 400010, Maharashtra, India
- Phone: +91 83558 15350 | +91 91373 32945
- Email: info.isengineering.co@gmail.com
- Website: https://isengineeringco.in
- GSTIN: 27AMZPK5174G1ZE
- Working Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 6:30 PM (IST)
- Supply Coverage: PAN India

## Products
- M.S. Flanges
- E Table Flanges (IS:1538)
- Blind Flanges
- Welding Neck Flanges
- Socket Weld Flanges
- Slip-On / Flat Flanges
- Male Female Flanges
- Forged Flanges
- M.S. Square Pipes
- M.S. ERW Round Pipes
- Elbow Fittings
- Reducer Fittings
